author: nnyj
description: Browser-style tab bar for switching between open notes on mobile. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: nnyj
manifest.description: Browser-style tab bar for switching between open notes on mobile.
manifest.name: Mobile Tab Bar

name: Mobile Tab Bar

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Fix lint warnings from Obsidian plugin linter.

- `setTimeout`/`clearTimeout` → `window.setTimeout`/`window.clearTimeout`
- `document` → `activeDocument` for popout window compatibility
- Removed `any` types, added `FileView` interface
- Removed `scrollbar-width: none` (partial browser support)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Initial release.

- Scrollable tab bar replacing the title bar on mobile
- Tap to switch, long-press to close
- Active tab auto-scrolls into view
- Save indicator dot with [autosave-control](https://github.com/slateblu3/obsidian-autosave-control) (optional)
- Mobile only, no effect on desktop
